headline: International Paper (IP): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: International Paper’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 22.9% of its value and falling to $35.65 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
